recommendations.title: Music Box
recommendations.overview: A lawyer defends her father accused of war crimes, but there is more to the case than she suspects.

recommendations.title: Betrayed
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent posing as a combine driver becomes romantically involved with a Midwest farmer who lives a double life as a white supremacist.

recommendations.title: Mad City
recommendations.overview: A misguided museum guard who loses his job and then tries to get it back at gunpoint is thrown into the fierce world of ratings-driven TV gone mad.

recommendations.title: Capital
recommendations.overview: The head of a giant European investment bank desperately clings to power when an American hedge fund company tries to buy them out.

recommendations.title: Missing

recommendations.title: State of Siege

recommendations.title: Adults in the Room
recommendations.overview: A universal theme: a story of people trapped in an inhuman network of power. The brutal circle of the Eurogroup meetings, who impose on Greece the dictatorship of austerity, where humanity and compassion are utterly disregarded. A claustrophobic trap

recommendations.title: The Ax
